en.title: Keep orchestration elsewhere. Let Epistola handle the PDFs.
en.description: Self-host with Docker, run on Kubernetes, or consume the managed service. Either way, you stay in control of data, security, and release cadence.

nl.title: Houd orkestratie elders. Laat Epistola de PDFs afhandelen.
nl.description: Self-host met Docker, draai op Kubernetes, of gebruik de managed service. In beide gevallen blijf jij in controle over data, beveiliging, en release cadence.
